[[File:Dresk_Kist.png|thumb|right|200px|A [[Slith]] drawn by Crane]]
'''Stephen Crane''' was an author and illustrator for [[West End Games]]. He was also the inventor of the [[Aurebesh/Legends|Aurebesh]] writing system as seen in the [[Star Wars Legends|Expanded Universe]] and in [[canon]].

==Works==
===Rolepaying-game sourcebooks as author===
:'''1991'''
*''[[Star Wars Miniatures Battles]]''

:'''1994'''
*''[[Star Wars Miniatures Battles Companion]]''
*{{Journal|4|Surprise Visit}}
:'''1996'''
*[[Imperial Entanglements (West End Games)|''Imperial Entanglements'']]
*''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Screen, Revised]]''
